description: Local visual-inspection fixtures for topological chessboard-grid debugging.

cases.name: GeminiChess1
cases.note: Severe distortion; bottom-left true positive corner has bad ring-fit axes, disk-fit is visually correct.

cases.name: GeminiChess2
cases.note: Occlusion and strong glass-ring clutter; threshold 100 removes most false ChESS responses.

cases.name: GeminiChess3
cases.note: Additional Gemini chessboard case for the same topological-stage inspection set.

cases.name: gptchess1
cases.note: Synthetic perspective case from the regression set; included for cross-checking the same topological stages.

cases.name: puzzleboard_example2
cases.note: Very strong optical warp; corner extraction is clean, downstream topology/geometry is the inspection target.
